Bash(cd /c/Projects/DISK && py -3.12 -c "from disk_diag.gui.main_window import MainWindow; print\('Import OK'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Projects/DISK && py -3.12 -c "
import ast, sys
# Check syntax by parsing all new/modified files
files = [
    'disk_diag/core/models.py',
    'disk_diag/core/surface_scan.py',
    'disk_diag/gui/surface_panel.py',
    'disk_diag/gui/main_window.py',
]
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
            ast.parse\(fh.read\(\), filename=f\)
        print\(f'OK: {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'SYNTAX ERROR in {f}: {e}'\)
        sys.exit\(1\)
print\('All files parse OK'\)
" 2>&1)
